name: dialogue_realism_collapse
description: Normalized failure mode asset for Dialogue Realism Collapse derived from approved evolution proposals.
related_rules: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
aliases: Dialogue metrics overweight semantic similarity, penalizing creative or diverse responses.
Style drift detector flags intentional stylistic shifts (e.g., POV changes) as regressions.
